name: Barbed Lasso
descs:
Turn End: Inflict [Burst] Potency on all enemies equal to their current Speed values.

When activating Lust Absolute Resonance, apply 3 [Burst] Potency and +3 [Burst] Count to a random enemy at Combat Start.

Turn End: Inflict [Burst] Potency on all enemies equal to (their current Speed values + 1).

When activating Lust Absolute Resonance, apply 4 [Burst] Potency and +3 [Burst] Count to a random enemy at Combat Start.

Turn End: Inflict [Burst] Potency on all enemies equal to (their current Speed values + 2).

When activating Lust Absolute Resonance, apply 5 [Burst] Potency and +4 [Burst] Count to a random enemy at Combat Start.
